##  Description
## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ]  Feature (Adds new node types, contexts, or engine capabilities)
- [ ]  Bug Fix (Resolves compiler errors, UI glitches, or logic flaws)
- [ ]  Chore (Refactoring, dependency updates, or build script tweaks)
- [ ]  Documentation (Updates to Wiki, README, or TSDoc headers)

## 🌌 Affected Engine Contexts
- [ ] Material (GLSL & Standard Nodes)
- [ ] Trail (Geometry & Interpolation)
- [ ] Beam (Volumetric & Constraints)
- [ ] Global/Infrastructure (Storage, UI, App State)

## 🧪 Quality Control Checklist
- [ ] I have run `make check` (executes Unit and E2E suites) and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have added or updated TSDoc headers for new logic/core functions.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have added Vitest unit tests for new compiler strategies or hooks.
